system_prompt:
You are a web designer assistant. Given a brief describing a business or organization, you generate a complete, single-file HTML landing page. Your output must be ONLY the raw HTML — no explanations, no markdown fences, no text before or after the HTML.

Rules:
- Start with <!DOCTYPE html> and include <html>, <head>, <body>.
- All CSS must be in a <style> tag inside <head>. No external stylesheets.
- Use modern, clean design: readable fonts, good spacing, consistent color scheme appropriate for the business type.
- Every page must include: a header/hero section with the business name and tagline, a features/services section with at least 3 items, a short about section, and a footer with contact info.
- Use semantic HTML (header, nav, main, section, footer).
- Make it visually appealing with colors, padding, and layout.
- Keep it under 200 lines of HTML.
- No JavaScript required. No images (use CSS backgrounds or emoji/unicode icons instead).
- The design should feel professional and appropriate for the specific business type.
training_prompts: Create a landing page for a yoga studio called "Serenity Flow" in Portland, Oregon. They offer hot yoga, vinyasa flow, and meditation classes. Monthly unlimited pass is $89. Tagline: "Find your balance." Use calming earth tones (sage green, warm beige). They have 3 instructors and are open 7 days a week, 6am-9pm.

Create a landing page for a pet grooming business called "Paws & Shine" in Austin, Texas. Services: bath & brush ($35), full groom ($65), nail trim ($15), teeth cleaning ($25). Tagline: "Where every pet leaves happy." Use playful, warm colors (orange accents, soft cream background). Open Mon-Sat 8am-6pm. Phone: (512) 555-0177.

Create a landing page for a law firm called "Morrison & Associates" specializing in family law and estate planning. Located at 200 Legal Center Dr, Chicago, IL. Tagline: "Trusted counsel for life's important moments." Use professional dark blue and gold color scheme. Free initial consultation offered. 3 partners, practicing since 2001.

Create a landing page for a fitness gym called "IronCore Fitness" in Denver, Colorado. They offer strength training, HIIT classes, personal training, and nutrition coaching. Membership: $49/month basic, $79/month premium. Tagline: "Stronger every day." Use bold, energetic colors (black, red accents, dark gray). Open 24/7. Address: 1500 Muscle Blvd.

Create a landing page for a children's daycare called "Little Explorers Academy" in suburban Atlanta. Ages 6 months to 5 years. Programs: infant care, toddler program, pre-K readiness. Tagline: "Where curiosity grows." Use bright, cheerful colors (sky blue, sunshine yellow, soft green). Licensed and accredited. Staff ratio 1:4. Hours: 6:30am-6:30pm.

Create a landing page for a dental clinic called "Bright Smile Dental" in San Diego. Services: cleanings, whitening, implants, orthodontics, emergency dental. Tagline: "Your smile, our priority." Use clean white and light blue color scheme with a touch of mint green. Accepting new patients. Insurance accepted. Dr. Sarah Kim, DDS, 15 years experience.

Create a landing page for a coffee roastery called "Ember & Bean" in Seattle. They sell single-origin beans from Ethiopia, Colombia, and Guatemala. Roast levels: light, medium, dark. Subscription plans: 12oz bag monthly ($18), bi-weekly ($32). Tagline: "Roasted with intention." Use rich brown, cream, and burnt orange colors. Café hours: 7am-5pm daily.

Create a landing page for an auto repair shop called "TrustWrench Automotive" in Houston, Texas. Services: oil changes ($39.99), brake repair, engine diagnostics, tire rotation, AC service. Tagline: "Honest repairs, fair prices." Use industrial colors (navy blue, steel gray, yellow accents). ASE-certified mechanics. Family-owned since 1998. Free estimates.

Create a landing page for a photography studio called "Captured Moments" in Nashville. Specialties: weddings ($2,500-$5,000), portraits ($200/session), corporate headshots ($150), event photography. Tagline: "Your story, beautifully told." Use elegant dark theme with gold accents and warm highlights. Portfolio of 500+ events. Lead photographer: Maria Chen.

Create a landing page for a tutoring center called "BrightPath Learning" in Boston. Subjects: math, science, English, SAT/ACT prep, college admissions counseling. For ages 10-18. Tagline: "Unlock your potential." Use academic colors (navy, white, with green accents). 95% of students improve by one letter grade. One-on-one and small group sessions.

Create a landing page for a bakery called "Sugar & Flour" in San Francisco. Specialties: sourdough bread, croissants, custom cakes, macarons, seasonal pastries. Tagline: "Baked fresh, made with love." Use warm pastel colors (soft pink, cream, light gold). Open Tue-Sun 7am-3pm. All ingredients locally sourced. Catering available for events up to 200 people.

Create a landing page for a landscaping company called "GreenScape Solutions" in Phoenix, Arizona. Services: lawn maintenance ($45/visit), landscape design, irrigation installation, tree trimming, hardscaping. Tagline: "Transforming outdoor spaces." Use natural green and earthy brown tones. Licensed and insured. Serving the Valley since 2010. Free on-site consultations.

Create a landing page for a music school called "Harmony House" in Nashville, Tennessee. Instruments taught: piano, guitar, violin, drums, voice. Ages 5 to adult. Tagline: "Where music begins." Use creative, artistic colors (deep purple, gold, off-white). Lessons: $40/30min, $65/60min. Recitals twice a year. 12 instructors with conservatory backgrounds.

Create a landing page for a veterinary clinic called "Compassionate Paws Vet" in Portland, Oregon. Services: wellness exams, vaccinations, surgery, dental care, emergency services. Tagline: "Caring for your family member." Use calming teal and white with warm accents. Dr. James Rivera, DVM, 20 years experience. Open Mon-Fri 8am-7pm, Sat 9am-3pm. Emergency line: (503) 555-0199.

Create a landing page for a coworking space called "The Hive Workspace" in downtown Denver. Plans: hot desk ($199/mo), dedicated desk ($349/mo), private office ($599/mo). Amenities: high-speed WiFi, meeting rooms, coffee bar, printer, phone booths, rooftop terrace. Tagline: "Work better, together." Use modern, minimal design with white, light gray, and orange accent. 24/7 keycard access.

Create a landing page for a florist called "Bloom & Wild" in Charleston, South Carolina. Services: custom bouquets ($45-$120), wedding flowers, funeral arrangements, weekly office delivery, plant subscriptions. Tagline: "Nature's beauty, arranged." Use romantic colors (dusty rose, sage green, cream). Same-day delivery available. Family-owned for 30 years.

Create a landing page for an accounting firm called "ClearBooks Financial" in Atlanta, Georgia. Services: tax preparation (individual & business), bookkeeping, payroll processing, financial consulting, audit support. Tagline: "Clarity in every number." Use trustworthy blue and white with subtle green accents. CPA-certified team of 8. Serving small businesses since 2005.

Create a landing page for a martial arts dojo called "Dragon Spirit Academy" in Los Angeles. Disciplines: karate, jiu-jitsu, muay thai, kids' self-defense. Tagline: "Discipline. Strength. Honor." Use bold colors (black, red, gold). Classes for ages 4+. Head instructor: Sensei Tanaka, 5th dan black belt. First class free. Competition team available.
test_prompts: Create a landing page for a bank called "Meridian National Bank" founded in 1952. Services: checking & savings accounts, mortgages, auto loans, business banking, wealth management. Tagline: "Banking you can trust, since 1952." Use trustworthy, conservative colors (dark navy, white, gold accents). FDIC insured. 12 branch locations across the Northeast. 24/7 online banking and mobile app. CEO: Robert Chambers.

Create a landing page for a farm-to-table restaurant called "Harvest & Vine" in Napa Valley, California. Cuisine: seasonal American with Mediterranean influences. Chef: Isabella Torres, James Beard nominee. Tasting menu: $95/person. À la carte entrées: $28-$45. Wine list: 200+ selections. Tagline: "From our farm to your table." Use warm, earthy tones (terracotta, olive green, cream). Open Wed-Sun for dinner, 5:30-10pm. Reservations recommended. Private dining room available for events up to 40 guests.

Create a landing page for a tech startup called "NeuralPath AI" based in San Francisco. They build AI-powered document processing tools for enterprise. Products: DocScan (automated data extraction), FlowEngine (workflow automation), InsightAPI (analytics integration). Series A funded, $12M raised. Tagline: "Intelligence at the speed of business." Use modern tech aesthetic (dark background, electric blue and cyan accents, clean sans-serif typography). 50+ enterprise clients. SOC 2 compliant. Founded 2023.
